name: common-docs
description: Skills for scaffolding and navigating the standard Common docs/ directory structure in any project.

skills.name: common-docs-scaffold
skills.description: Scaffold the standard Common docs/ directory structure in a project. Creates all section directories and stub files with correct frontmatter. Use when asked to "set up docs", "scaffold documentation", "create the docs structure", or "add docs to this project".

skills.name: common-docs-write
skills.description: Write the actual content of a specific documentation file following the Common docs/ specification. Use when asked to write, fill in, or populate a doc — e.g. "write the architecture overview", "fill in the threat model", "write the getting started guide", "document our API endpoints", "write an ADR for X".

skills.name: common-docs-find
skills.description: Find the right documentation file in a project using the standard Common docs/ structure. Use when asked where to find something, where to document something, which file covers a topic, or when about to read or write docs and need to know the correct location.
